metadata.description: Personal fork of claude-hud — OAC-tuned (Claude Code), OMC-compatible, darwin/linux only, built-in launcher script

plugins.name: claude-hud
plugins.description: Real-time statusline for Claude Code, tuned for OpenAgentsControl (oac:* subagent rendering, background-agent completion via <task-notification>) with leftover oh-my-claudecode compat (proxy_ tool routing). macOS/Linux only.
